message:
Running command: # Step 30 is the new Floorplan. Check if IT has the port
grep -i "reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h" \
    /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/30-openroad-floorplan/openroad-floorplan.log 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo "---check state_in for step 30---"
# What ODB did step 30 take as input?
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/30-openroad-floorplan/state_in.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('nl', d.get('SYNTHESIS_RESULTS', '')))" 2>/dev/null | head -5
